channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-08
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. In the scienceverse/metacheck repository, Lakens made significant improvements to the `data_check` branch, enhancing cache functionality, data handling, and folder management. Meanwhile, in the JamieCummins/regcheck project, updates were made to the "staging" branch, including an update to the default OpenAI model and aesthetic bug fixes, as well as important backend changes to improve handling of insufficient evidence. These refinements demonstrate the community's commitment to refining and enhancing existing tools, and we celebrate the connections between projects like metacheck and regcheck, which both aim to improve data validation and handling. Notably, the focus on improving backend functionality and user experience in both projects highlights the community's dedication to creating robust and user-friendly research tools. Overall, these updates showcase the community's collaborative spirit and dedication to advancing open-source research.

56 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck4 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. As stated in the commit message, "admin updates" were performed, but the specifics of these updates are not detailed. The branch was then merged into itself, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commits. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten. The commit messages do not provide further information on the nature of the administrative updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
